Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Totem of the Dragon King]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Totem of the Dragon King is a gold statue of a boy with broad dragon's wings that releases a projection of the Dragon King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Totem of the Dragon King carries a measure of the Dragon King's spirit and authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The power of the Totem of the Dragon King is limited by how much Sophara can control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Dragon King’s Totem is a prize from the last round.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Dragon King’s Totem condensed into a crown of power over Sophara's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Dragon King’s Totem can stall the Sage of Red Faith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Dragon King’s Totem filled the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Dragon King’s Totem began to dissolve in the sky.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
